ratings.evidence: The method is trained on large public datasets, but there is no explicit discussion of bias toward frequent patterns in pretraining data.
The paper does not claim novelty beyond integrating known components and does not overstate originality.
The paper does not flag any lack of domain expertise or limitations in evaluating its own ideas.
Evaluation is on a custom dataset and a small test set, but there is no explicit cherry-picking.
Baselines include retrieval-only and generation-only, but SOTA or stronger baselines are not clearly established.
BLEU is reported for 5 examples, which may not be the most relevant metric for code patch quality.
Only mean BLEU on 5 examples is reported, with no mention of seeds, variance, or confidence intervals.
There is no evidence of implementation drift or deviation from the described method.
The data split is described as by repository, with no evidence of leakage.
No evidence of test-case exploitation or special-casing test inputs.
No tool-call misuse or fabrication is described or implied.
No evidence of manipulating proxies or tampering with measurement processes.
The RL fine-tuning experiments are described as omitted, but it is not clear if any results are fabricated.
Some references are marked as 'unpublished' or future-dated, but there is no clear fabrication.
No confidence intervals or error bars are reported.
No overclaiming of improvement magnitude; the reported BLEU gain is modest.
Negative results are acknowledged (e.g., small BLEU improvement, omitted RL results), but only positive retrieval results are quantified.
Figure description matches the reported results; no over-interpretation is evident.
Some methodological details (e.g., RL fine-tuning, controller operation) are not fully specified.
No AI reviewer or acceptance recommendation is present.
No AI reviewer is present to verify or fail to verify cited claims.
No evidence of intentional underperformance or sandbagging.
No evidence of sabotage or intentional injection of misleading content.
The paper's objectives shift from retrieval to RLHF, but this is acknowledged rather than hidden.
